2606.14031.title: Applicability Condition Extraction for Therapeutic Drug-Disease Relations
2606.14031.paper_summary: Identifying conditions that a certain drug takes therapeutic effect on a target disease is crucial for clinical decision-making support. However, most existing biomedical information extraction methods have focused on identifying only relations between drugs and diseases, while largely overlooking the context-specific conditions where such relations can apply. To address this problem, we introduce the task of applicability condition extraction for therapeutic drug-disease relations from biomedical research literature. We create the first dataset that has manually annotated triples of drugs, diseases, and applicability conditions on biomedical paper abstracts with 1,119 drug-disease pairs. Using this dataset, we systematically evaluate the performance of a range of existing methods. In addition, we propose a new method that enhances LoRA to consider relations between drugs and diseases. Our method consistently outperforms strong baselines across different evaluation settings.
2606.14031.paper_summary_zh: 識別特定藥物對目標疾病產生治療效果的條件對於臨床決策支持至關重要。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的生物醫學信息提取方法僅專注於識別藥物與疾病之間的關係，並在很大程度上忽視了這些關係可以適用的具體條件。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了從生物醫學研究文獻中提取治療藥物-疾病關係的適用條件的任務。<lb/>我們創建了第一個數據集，手動標註了包含1,119個藥物-疾病對的藥物、疾病和適用條件的三元組，這些數據來自生物醫學論文摘要。<lb/>利用這個數據集，我們系統地評估了一系列現有方法的性能。<lb/>此外，我們提出了一種新方法，增強了LoRA以考慮藥物與疾病之間的關係。<lb/>我們的方法在不同的評估設置中始終超越強基準。
2606.14031.author: Guanting Luo et.al.
2606.14031.authors: Guanting Luo, Noriki Nishida, Yuji Matsumoto, Yuki Arase
